methodology: Each entry is an event-level record with a verification tier: 'multi' (≥2 independent sources), 'single' (one source), 'disputed' (sources disagree materially). Source URLs are part of the canonical record; bias of the source is disclosed in metadata.
data_status: illustrative — pipeline not yet live; entries pattern-mirror what live ingestion would produce

tier_definitions.multi: Confirmed by two or more independent sources within 30 days, casualty figures agree within ±20%.
tier_definitions.single: Reported by one source; not yet corroborated. Surfaced anyway with explicit tag.
tier_definitions.disputed: Multiple sources but materially disagree on facts or casualty count.
tier_definitions.adjudicated: Confirmed by a court of record (ICC, ICJ, ICTY/ICTR, or comparable national court).

events.summary: Airstrike on village in Sagaing region; 22 civilians reported killed
Mass detention reported in El Fasher; 200+ held without charge
Three additional outlets designated 'foreign agents'; cumulative total since 2022: 614
Single-source report alleges medical neglect at Mississippi facility; one detainee died awaiting transfer
Two protesters executed; convictions reportedly based on confessions obtained under torture
Strike on aid distribution point in central Gaza; UN says 14 killed including 9 women and children
Counter-insurgency operation in Yatenga; 38 civilians reported killed in single village
UN Commission of Inquiry receives testimony of 18 additional cases of public execution since January
Citizen Lab confirms forensic match: spyware deployed against Hong Kong–based Uyghur activist's family overseas
Town in North Kivu fell to advancing forces; 6 civilians killed in initial assault
Death of detainee in custody; family alleges torture, authorities cite cardiac arrest
Journalist arrested on sedition charges after reporting on caste violence
Constitutional Court orders release of imprisoned former opposition mayor; government refuses to comply
Five executions including one Yemeni national for non-violent drug offense
Drone strike on civilian convoy attributed to government forces; 13 reportedly killed
Civil-asset-forfeiture program disclosed; $2.1B seized without conviction over 5 years

events.actor: Israeli settler groups in West Bank
events.summary: Settler attack on Palestinian village in Hebron hills; 2 injured, livestock killed, homes burned
Opposition figure Victoire Ingabire denied permission to register political party for 2027 elections
